◎简　　介  

　　Two less than successful film producers, approaching mid-life crisis and clinging to their nerdy sci-fi obsessions, suddenly meet their idol: William Shatner.
　　條目創建人：tvxqmilk星夜桐影
　　兩位不成功的電影製作人接近中年危機，轉向他們對宅男科幻世紀的迷戀，突然遇見她們的向威廉夏納。
introduction:
Two less than successful film producers, approaching mid-life crisis and clinging to their nerdy sci-fi obsessions, suddenly meet their idol: William Shatner.

兩位不成功的電影製作人接近中年危機，轉向他們對宅男科幻世紀的迷戀，突然遇見她們的向威廉夏納。
